data.title: Farmers Business Network spins off crop protection arm
data.description: Farmers Business Network, better known as FBN, will focus on its role as a technology-driven marketplace.

data.title: Home Depot pushes deeper into B2B ecommerce with digital project planning
data.description: Home Depot’s strategy illustrates a broader shift in B2B commerce: it’s no longer enough to offer an online catalog.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: Why people abandon carts
data.description: New survey results in the 2025 Ecommerce Conversion Report showed why people are leaving items behind — and the answers highlight clear opportunities.

data.title: Walmart to build a $300 million North Carolina fulfillment center
data.description: Currently, Walmart operates more than 214 stores and Sam’s Clubs in North Carolina, along with seven supply chain facilities.

data.title: Procurement teams widely adopt AI, but few achieve maturity
data.description: Three-quarters (72%) described their AI maturity as “moderate,” with gains limited to certain functions.
